reasoning: With only ~66 days remaining in 2025, and background reports indicating a shift AWAY from direct troop deployment toward alternative arrangements due to US and Russian opposition, the chances of the Coalition of the Willing reversing course and deploying forces before the end of the year are very low. Multinational ground deployments require significant logistical preparation and political consensus, which currently appears lacking. Although operational plans were once 'well developed,' the shift away from deployment makes rapid execution by December 31 highly improbable.
